text: {{c1::Mixture}}-of-Experts routes each token to a subset of specialist subnetworks, increasing capacity without matching the cost of a full dense model.
explanation: MoE is a major technique for scaling language models efficiently while keeping inference manageable.
usage: Used in frontier LLMs, routing-heavy inference systems, and large-scale generative platforms.
spanish: Mixture-of-Experts enruta cada token a un subconjunto de subredes especializadas, aumentando capacidad sin igualar el costo de un modelo denso completo.

text: {{c1::Prefix caching}} reuses computed attention states for repeated prompt prefixes across requests.
explanation: It is one of the most effective latency and cost optimizations for multi-turn chat systems.
usage: Common in assistants, chat APIs, and enterprise copilots.
spanish: El prefix caching reutiliza estados de atención calculados para prefijos de prompt repetidos entre solicitudes.

text: {{c1::Continuous batching}} dynamically packs incoming requests into the next decode step instead of waiting for a fixed batch size.
explanation: It improves throughput and tail latency for real-time serving systems.
usage: Essential in high-concurrency LLM APIs and interactive applications.
spanish: El continuous batching empaqueta dinámicamente solicitudes entrantes en el siguiente paso de decodificación en lugar de esperar un batch fijo.

text: {{c1::Paged attention}} manages key-value cache memory in pages so long-context inference can scale more efficiently.
explanation: It is a core optimization for serving large context windows without memory fragmentation.
usage: Used in long-context chat, retrieval, and document analysis systems.
spanish: Paged attention gestiona la memoria del KV cache en páginas para que la inferencia con contextos largos escale más eficientemente.

text: {{c1::Latency budgeting}} allocates target time to preprocessing, model execution, retrieval, and postprocessing.
explanation: It helps teams design systems that meet SLA expectations under real-world conditions.
usage: Important for customer-facing copilots and real-time automation.
spanish: El latency budgeting asigna tiempo objetivo a preprocesado, ejecución del modelo, recuperación y postprocesado.

text: {{c1::Model routing}} sends requests to the cheapest or most suitable model based on task complexity and latency requirements.
explanation: It is a practical pattern for reducing cost while preserving quality.
usage: Widely used in multi-model AI platforms and agentic stacks.
spanish: El model routing envía solicitudes al modelo más barato o más adecuado según complejidad de la tarea y requisitos de latencia.
